verdict: G1-PARTIAL: power-sum N-counting PROVED loss-free; D-loss telescoped to one BD invocation; uniform-geometry residual = BD discrete well-separated reduction (single named ingredient)

claims.name: powersum_superadditive
claims.detail: (sum N_theta^1.05 <= (sum N_theta)^1.05 on 400 random partitions, worst lhs/rhs = 1.0000 <= 1; incl. maximally-unbalanced (N-1,1) for N up to 499: the N-counting in the recursion is LOSS-FREE regardless of split balance)

claims.name: powersum_tight_only_trivial
claims.detail: (slack 1 - lhs/rhs: trivial partition (200,) = 0.00e+00 (tight), balanced (100,100) = 0.0341 (strict): equality needs a single part -- any genuine split is loss-free with room to spare)

claims.name: naive_tree_blowup
claims.detail: (maximally-unbalanced tree, N=30: naive per-generation D0^2 accumulates to D0^(2(N-1)) = 2.88e+17 = exp(40.2) -- EXPONENTIAL in N, NOT N^O(eps): the naive fixed-scale tree induction FAILS, exactly the documented obstruction)

claims.name: oneshot_polynomial_separation
claims.detail: (polynomially-separated s = N^-3: one-shot loss s^(-2eps) = N^(6eps) = N^0.60 (a fixed power of N, = N^O(eps)) REPLACES the exponential D0^(2(N-1)); at N=1000 log one-shot 4.1 << log naive 1384.9 -- submultiplicativity removes the tree-depth dependence)

claims.name: uniform_geometry_residual_named
claims.detail: (adversarial sub-polynomial s = e^-N: one-shot exponent log_N(s^-2eps) = 2 eps N/log N GROWS 1.8 -> 10.5 -> 74.9 (N=30/300/3000), UNBOUNDED -- NOT N^O(eps); the uniform-in-geometry N^{2+eps} is NOT delivered by telescoping alone. RESIDUAL (named): the BD discrete well-separated reduction OR poly-separation s>=N^-C. R2 is thereby reduced from vague multi-scale bookkeeping to ONE clean invocation; the N-counting (power-sum) is fully PROVED here)
